---
title: "Alias Resolution Test"
subtitle: "TEST-ALIAS"
id: "test-alias"
toc: false
---

Verifying backward compatibility for interaction names.

## Sessions


- [SE01: Alias Test Session](se01/index.qmd)

<!-- START_NAVIGATION -->


```{=html}
<div class="custom-page-navigation">
    <div class="nav-prev">
        
    </div>
    <div class="nav-next">
        
        <a href="se01/index.qmd">
            <span class="nav-label">Next →</span>
            <span class="nav-title">Alias Test Session</span>
        </a>
        
    </div>
</div>
```

<!-- END_NAVIGATION -->
